title: InfChest
description: Add a chest which can hold nearly unlimited items of one kind of item
body:
This mod adds a chest which can hold single item almost infinitely.

Chests in other mods can hold up to about 2 billion only. It's not enough to store auto collected materials such as Cobblestone, Dirt, Netherrack. With this mod, you should get just one chest for an item. The chest in my mod can store all amount of items, over 2 billion, over the max of long.

See gallery for some detail images.

For both Forge and Fabric version, this mod doesn't require dependency mods without the platform.

Link to [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/infchest)
